channel.title: Mathematica Slovaca
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Mathematica Slovaca

item.title: Algebraic structures formalizing the logic of effect algebras incorporating time dimension
item.description: Article by Mariem Ammar, Imen Boutouria, Afif Masmoudi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ms-2024-0098

item.description: Article by Mariem Ammar, Imen Boutouria, Afif Masmoudi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ms-2024-0099

item.description: Article by Mariem Ammar, Imen Boutouria, Afif Masmoudi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ms-2024-0101

item.title: On indices of quintic number fields defined by x5 + ax + b
item.description: Article by Mariem Ammar, Imen Boutouria, Afif Masmoudi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ms-2024-0102

item.title: Note on fundamental system of solutions to the differential equations (D2 − 2Dα + α2 ± β2) y = 0
item.description: Article by Mariem Ammar, Imen Boutouria, Afif Masmoudi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ms-2024-0103

item.title: A new Approach of Generalized Fractional Integrals in Multiplicative Calculus and Related Hermite–Hadamard-Type Inequalities with Applications
item.description: Article by Mariem Ammar, Imen Boutouria, Afif Masmoudi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ms-2024-0105
